stt.heardError: Ndo, enweghị ike ịnụ gị. Biko nwaa ọzọ.
stt.micAccessError: Enweghị ike ịnweta igwe okwu. Lelee ikike.

error.passwordRequired: Okwuntughe achọrọ maka faịlụ .ania ezoro ezo
error.noSource: Enweghị isi iyi avatar enyere (avatarUrl ma ọ bụ avatarData)

greetings.0: Ndewo! Kedu ka m ga-esi nyere gị aka taa?
greetings.1: Nnọọ! Nnọọ! Kedu ihe m ga-emere gị?
greetings.2: Ndewo ebe ahụ! Obi dị m ụtọ ịgwa gị okwu!
greetings.3: Nnọọ! Abịara m ebe a iji nyere aka. Kedu ihe ị chọrọ?
greetings.4: Ndewo! Kedu ka ị mere? Kedu ka m ga-esi baa uru?

waiting.4: Ana m elele nke ahụ maka gị...
